features.heroDesc: Core features that simplify the complexity of global selling

f1.title: Bulk Listing Across Marketplaces
f1.desc: List products across dozens of local and overseas platforms with a single Excel. AI auto-maps categories and recommends keywords & image tags to drastically reduce listing time.
f1.li1: Bulk listing across marketplaces (Amazon, Shopee, Lazada, TikTok Shop, Coupang, Naver, etc.)
f1.li2: AI-powered automatic category mapping per platform
f1.li3: AI keyword suggestions & auto-generated image tags

f2.title: Order Management
f2.desc: Auto-collect orders from every marketplace and view statuses in one place. Maximize efficiency with bulk processing.
f2.li1: Auto-collect orders from all marketplaces (local & overseas)

f3.title: Inventory Management
f3.desc: Sync multi-channel inventory in real time to prevent stockouts. AI analyzes sales trends to forecast optimal stock levels.
f3.li3: AI inventory forecasting based on sales trends

f4.title: Tracking & Shipping
f4.desc: Auto-fill tracking numbers and integrate with carriers in real time. Push delivery tracking updates to customers automatically.
f4.li1: Auto-fill tracking numbers (auto-pushed to each marketplace)
f4.li2: Carrier integrations (CJ, Hanjin, Korea Post, international carriers)

f5.title: Purchase Order Management
f5.desc: Auto-create purchase orders based on stock thresholds and manage suppliers systematically. View PO history and incoming stock at a glance.

f6.title: Customer Service Management
f6.desc: Manage customer inquiries from every marketplace in one place. Auto-reply templates and multilingual support keep global CS efficient.
f6.li1: Unified collection of inquiries from each marketplace
f6.li4: CS handling status & response rate stats

f7.title: ERP Integration
f7.desc: Connect to existing ERP via API to auto-push accounting and tax data. Manage data uniformly without duplicate input.
f7.li1: API integration with existing ERPs (Ecount, Douzone, etc.)

f8.title: Logistics Automation
f8.desc: Automate dispatch and optimally assign carriers. The system handles returns and exchanges automatically.
f8.li1: Auto dispatch (ship instruction immediately on order confirmation)

f9.title: BI Analytics
f9.desc: Unified analysis of sales, ad ROAS, and CRM data. See brand growth metrics at a glance and decide with data.

f10.title: AI-Powered Automation
f10.desc: AI suggests product names, keywords, categories, multilingual translations, and optimal prices — handling repetitive seller tasks.
f10.li3: AI multilingual translation (English, Thai, Vietnamese, etc.)

f11.title: Export Declaration Automation
f11.desc: Auto-issue e-commerce export purchase confirmations and integrate with uTradeHub to automate every step. HS code auto-classification simplifies customs.

f12.title: Global Margin Tool
f12.desc: Verify profitability up front with margin calculations that include FX, fees, ads, logistics, and customs. Compare net profit across platforms at a glance.
f12.li1: Includes FX / fees / ads / logistics / customs costs
f12.li2: Sale-price simulation to validate profitability up front
